title: Roles
createDescription: Create a new role with specific permissions for your team.
editDescription: Update the role name, description, or permissions.
noRolesYetDescription: Create your first role to manage team permissions.
noRolesFoundDescription: No roles match "{query}". Try a different search term.
roleNameExists: A role with this name already exists
deleteRoleConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{name}" role? Users assigned this role will lose its permissions.
